meaning: n.库存书籍目录,重版目录,重版书vt.列入重版目录
examples: It can consult its own backlist.
There's a ludicrously large backlist in books and this could mean a massive new revenue stream.
But Disney doesn't need to go to Africa to see the effects of these perverse protections; it can consult its own backlist.
The project is Google's attempt to crack into the market of distributing current and backlist works.
But it has the sort of solid backlist that makes a publisher feel comfortable.
